import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import esm

class ESM2Regressor(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, model_name='esm2_t12_35M_UR50D', region_start=561, region_end=589):
        super().__init__()
        self.esm, self.alphabet = esm.pretrained.load_model_and_alphabet(model_name)
        self.region_start = region_start
        self.region_end = region_end
        self.embed_dim = self.esm.embed_dim
        self.head = nn.Linear(self.embed_dim, 1)
        # wild type region embedding will be set externally
        self.register_buffer('wt_region_emb', None)
        self.wt_fitness = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(0.0))

    def forward(self, tokens):
        # tokens: (B, L) LongTensor – ESM2 internally builds attention mask from padding_idx
        results = self.esm(tokens, repr_layers=[self.esm.num_layers], return_contacts=False)
        x = results['representations'][self.esm.num_layers]  # (B, L, embed)
        # Region slice: position 0 is <cls>, then amino acid at position 1+n
        start = self.region_start + 1
        end = self.region_end + 1
        x = x[:, start:end, :]
        # Mean pool over the mutation region
        x = x.mean(dim=1)  # (B, embed)
        if self.wt_region_emb is not None:
            x = x - self.wt_region_emb
        delta = self.head(x).squeeze(-1)
        return delta + self.wt_fitness
